metadata.description: Raphael — a learning layer (brain) for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: raphael-brain
plugins.description: Distills lessons from your real projects and injects the relevant ones back at the right moment. Ships 11 agents (incl. an authorized Red Team pentester), a recall skill, and the /brain review flow. Requires the `raph` CLI: npm install -g maheshaggarwal21/raphael.
